title: pavonia palmata
intro: Pavonia palmata, also known as Rose Mallow or Mountain Mallow, is a flowering plant species in the mallow family (Malvaceae). This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The medicinal properties of Pavonia palmata are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and soothe digestive issues, making it beneficial for health conditions such as arthritis, digestive disorders, and skin irritations. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used topically in the form of creams, ointments, and salves to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
